models.frozen_qvszp: all coeffs_env entries zero; q-vSZP environment response frozen; diagnostic only
models.no_acp: top-level ACP model marker absent; ACP-free diagnostic only
models.no_anisotropic_multipole: top-level multipole block absent; anisotropic multipole diagnostic only; periodic electrostatics/images remain
models.no_exchange: top-level exchange block absent; diagnostic only

route_audit.periodic: CELL/POISSON PERIODIC XYZ/PERIODIC, Gamma-centered MP 2x2x2, FULL_GRID ON, SYMMETRY OFF
route_audit.zero_d: CELL/POISSON PERIODIC NONE/NONE with ANALYTIC solver and no KPOINTS section; CP2K passes periodic=[False,False,False] to save_tblite, so save_tblite has no periodic lattice images

selection.excluded: VII scale 4: largest periodic vector 42.2194773541 A
